docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ, TIRZA ELIZABETH MARTINEZ , AN INDIVIDUAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, JOHN PAUL ,AN INDIVIDUAL, AKA JOHN GONZALEZ $7,059.68 PRINCIPAL, $1,002.82 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,287.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
